# getPathObjectsFromRoot

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Reads and enables pagination through a set of `Object`.

## Usage

```typescript
useGetPathObjectsFromRootQuery({ databaseId: '<value>', id: '<value>', path: '<value>', first: '<value>', offset: '<value>', after: '<value>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useGetPathObjectsFromRootQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useGetPathObjectsFromRootQuery({ databaseId: '<value>', id: '<value>', path: '<value>', first: '<value>', offset: '<value>', after: '<value>' });
```
